user.title: Connect to N.I.N.A.
user.description: Enter the details for your N.I.N.A. instance running the Advanced API plugin (port 1888 by default).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to N.I.N.A. – check host/port and ensure the Advanced API plugin is running.
error.unknown: Unexpected error – check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This N.I.N.A. instance is already configured.

camera_cool.name: Cool Camera
camera_cool.description: Start cooling the camera to a target temperature.

temperature.name: Target Temperature (°C)
temperature.description: Target sensor temperature in degrees Celsius.

minutes.name: Ramp Time (minutes)
minutes.description: Time over which to ramp to target temperature.

minutes.name: Ramp Time (minutes)
minutes.description: Time over which to ramp back to ambient.

gain.name: Gain
gain.description: Camera gain (optional, uses current setting if omitted).

save.name: Save to Disk
save.description: Whether to save the image to disk.

mount_slew.name: Slew Mount
mount_slew.description: Slew the mount to J2000 RA/Dec coordinates.

enabled.name: Tracking Enabled
enabled.description: True to enable tracking, false to disable.

focuser_move.name: Move Focuser
focuser_move.description: Move the focuser to an absolute position.

filterwheel_change_filter.name: Change Filter
filterwheel_change_filter.description: Rotate the filter wheel to a given filter.

filter_index.name: Filter Index
filter_index.description: Zero-based index of the target filter.

force_calibration.name: Force Calibration
force_calibration.description: Force a new calibration before guiding.

sequence_load.name: Load Sequence
sequence_load.description: Load a sequence file from disk.
